title: Got an Old Kindle? It Might Not Work Anymore

• Affected devices transition to a **manual side-loading** paradigm, requiring USB connectivity for data transfer from desktop environments.

title: A. J. Ayer – ‘What I Saw When I Was Dead’ (1988)

- Explores the **qualia of perception** during physiological failure, highlighting how internal mental models may operate independently of standard sensory input.

Identifies a 'bright red light' and a sense of 'space-time' governance as core components of the experience.

Maintains a skeptical philosophical stance while acknowledging the profound impact of the 'anomalous data' on his worldview.
Highlights the distinction between raw subjective experience and the scientific validation of mental states.

title: Amazon won't release Fire Sticks that support sideloading anymore
